title: Opening for Store Manager at Domino's India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Domino's India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Domino's India International Enterprises in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Domino's India International Enterprises:
Domino's India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India International Enterprises!
